NimbusWorks Service Handbook: gatekeeper

gatekeeper is the API gateway; terminates TLS and routes external requests. It is owned by the Edge & Traffic team (lead: Ines Delgado, on-call channel #oncall-edge). gatekeeper listens on port 7443 and has a p99 latency SLO of 120ms. It depends on: tokensmith. No other service depends on gatekeeper.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: tokensmith

tokensmith is the issues and validates NimbusAuth session tokens. It is owned by the Core Platform team (lead: Farida Rahman, on-call channel #oncall-coreplat). tokensmith listens on port 7020 and has a p99 latency SLO of 40ms. It depends on: vaultkeep. Services that depend on tokensmith: gatekeeper, ledgerline.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: vaultkeep

vaultkeep is the secrets and key-material store. It is owned by the Core Platform team (lead: Farida Rahman, on-call channel #oncall-coreplat). vaultkeep listens on port 7030 and has a p99 latency SLO of 25ms. It has no upstream dependencies. Services that depend on vaultkeep: tokensmith.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: ledgerline

ledgerline is the payment ledger; records all transactions. It is owned by the Payments team (lead: Kwame Mensah, on-call channel #oncall-payments). ledgerline listens on port 7210 and has a p99 latency SLO of 200ms. It depends on: tokensmith, quillbase. Services that depend on ledgerline: courierbot.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: quillbase

quillbase is the primary OLTP database proxy. It is owned by the Data Services team (lead: Tomasz Krol, on-call channel #oncall-data). quillbase listens on port 7305 and has a p99 latency SLO of 60ms. It has no upstream dependencies. Services that depend on quillbase: glacierdocs, ledgerline, streamforge.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: streamforge

streamforge is the event streaming and change-data-capture pipeline. It is owned by the Data Services team (lead: Tomasz Krol, on-call channel #oncall-data). streamforge listens on port 7320 and has a p99 latency SLO of 90ms. It depends on: quillbase. Services that depend on streamforge: courierbot, pulseboard.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: glacierdocs

glacierdocs is the document archive and retrieval service. It is owned by the Data Services team (lead: Tomasz Krol, on-call channel #oncall-data). glacierdocs listens on port 7340 and has a p99 latency SLO of 300ms. It depends on: quillbase. No other service depends on glacierdocs.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: pulseboard

pulseboard is the internal metrics and alerting dashboard. It is owned by the Core Platform team (lead: Farida Rahman, on-call channel #oncall-coreplat). pulseboard listens on port 7050 and has a p99 latency SLO of 150ms. It depends on: streamforge. No other service depends on pulseboard.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: mistral-cache

mistral-cache is the edge response cache (LRU, 64GB per node). It is owned by the Edge & Traffic team (lead: Ines Delgado, on-call channel #oncall-edge). mistral-cache listens on port 7460 and has a p99 latency SLO of 15ms. It has no upstream dependencies. No other service depends on mistral-cache.

NimbusWorks Service Handbook: courierbot

courierbot is the sends receipts and payment notifications. It is owned by the Payments team (lead: Kwame Mensah, on-call channel #oncall-payments). courierbot listens on port 7230 and has a p99 latency SLO of 250ms. It depends on: ledgerline, streamforge. No other service depends on courierbot.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-1101

Error NBX-1101 is raised by tokensmith and means: token signing key rotation failed. Remediation: run `nbx keys rotate --service tokensmith --force`, then restart tokensmith. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Core Platform on-call via #oncall-coreplat.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-1102

Error NBX-1102 is raised by tokensmith and means: token validation latency above SLO. Remediation: check vaultkeep health first; if healthy, scale tokensmith to 4 replicas. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Core Platform on-call via #oncall-coreplat.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-2201

Error NBX-2201 is raised by quillbase and means: connection pool exhausted. Remediation: raise pool_max to 512 via `nbx config set quillbase pool_max 512` and restart. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Data Services on-call via #oncall-data.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-2202

Error NBX-2202 is raised by quillbase and means: replication lag above 30s. Remediation: pause streamforge consumers, let lag drain below 5s, then resume. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Data Services on-call via #oncall-data.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-3301

Error NBX-3301 is raised by gatekeeper and means: upstream connect timeout. Remediation: check tokensmith health; gatekeeper retries do NOT apply to POST routes. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Edge & Traffic on-call via #oncall-edge.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-3302

Error NBX-3302 is raised by mistral-cache and means: cache hit rate below 40%. Remediation: verify cache keys include the region prefix; flush with `nbx cache flush --node all`. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Edge & Traffic on-call via #oncall-edge.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-4401

Error NBX-4401 is raised by ledgerline and means: double-entry imbalance detected. Remediation: freeze writes with `nbx ledger freeze`, run `nbx ledger reconcile`, page Payments lead. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Payments on-call via #oncall-payments.

NimbusWorks Runbook NBX-5501

Error NBX-5501 is raised by streamforge and means: consumer group stalled. Remediation: run `nbx stream rewind --group <group> --to-checkpoint` then unpause. If the remediation fails twice, escalate to the Data Services on-call via #oncall-data.

NimbusWorks Policy (deploy-freeze)

Production deploys are frozen every Friday 18:00 UTC through Monday 06:00 UTC.

NimbusWorks Policy (sev1)

A Sev1 incident requires paging the service team lead within 10 minutes and posting to #incident-bridge.

NimbusWorks Policy (rollback)

Any deploy showing error-rate increase above 2% within 15 minutes must be rolled back with `nbx deploy rollback <service>`.

NimbusWorks Policy (secrets)

Secrets may only be read through vaultkeep; direct file access is a fireable offense.

NimbusWorks Policy (capacity)

Services must run at least 2 replicas in prod; payments services at least 3.

NimbusWorks CLI Reference (nbx)

- `nbx status <service>`: show health, replica count, error rate, p99 latency of a service
- `nbx logs <service> --tail N`: show last N log lines of a service
- `nbx deploy rollback <service>`: roll a service back to the previous release
- `nbx scale <service> --replicas N`: set replica count
- `nbx config set <service> <key> <value>`: set a config value (requires restart)
- `nbx restart <service>`: rolling restart of a service
- `nbx keys rotate --service <service> --force`: force key-material rotation
- `nbx ledger freeze`: freeze ledgerline writes (Sev1 payments action)
- `nbx cache flush --node all`: flush mistral-cache on every node
